summary:
The Venturi mask provides more consistent delivery of higher oxygen concentrations compared to a nasal cannula because it can precisely adjust mixed gas fractions based on patient needs while offering better usability across different settings; thus, it meets stringent respiratory therapy demands effectively when aiming for optimal therapeutic outcomes involving controlled levels of supplemental O₂ administration directly into lungs via face masks designed specifically engineered around such objectives . Agent2 concludes by emphasizing why the Venturi Mask surpasses Nasal Cannulas concerning accuracy & flexibility needed particularly within medical contexts requiring tight regulation parameters alongside ease-of-use attributes beneficial both clinically AND practically speaking throughout diverse treatment protocols targeting various lung conditions needing continuous monitoring / - Key difference lies in ability achieve very high percentages (>90%) easily whereas nasal cannula maxes out ~50%
